mapper.insert: INSERT INTO elder_info (user_id, age, gender, height, weight, medical_history, allergy, emergency_contact, emergency_phone, address, device_id, create_time, update_time,elder_name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{height}, #{weight}, #{medicalHistory}, #{allergy}, #{emergencyContact}, #{emergencyPhone}, #{address}, #{deviceId}, NOW(), NOW(),#{name})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM elder_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
select * from elder_info where id = #{id} AND status = 1
select * from elder_info where elder_name = #{name} AND status = 1
mapper.update: update elder_info set status = 0, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} AND status = 1
update elder_info set status = 0, update_time = NOW() where user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
update elder_info set status = 1, update_time = NOW() where id = #{id} AND status = 0
